scenario.key_phrase: Too expensive, let me think about it

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Good morning! Main Priya bol rahi hun PhysicsWallah se. Aapka naam kya hai?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hi Pallavi! Patna se ho na? Bahut accha! Aap currently kis class mein ho?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! Toh aap engineering ya medical ki preparation karna chahte ho? Kya target hai aapka?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: JEE Advanced clear karna hai... but abhi toh 10th complete karna hai pehle.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul sahi thinking hai Pallavi! Early start bohot important hai. Toh 2027 mein JEE denge na? Hamare paas JEE Lakshya 2027 batch hai - 2 saal ka complete foundation with advanced level prep. Kya budget range socha hai aapne?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan 2027 mein... but budget ka problem hai. Parents ko paise ki tension rehti hai.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Main samajh sakti hun Pallavi. Dekho, JEE Lakshya 2027 is ₹35,999 for complete 2 years. But hum 0% EMI dete hain PW Pay se - sirf ₹3,499 per month. Daily chai-paani se bhi kam! Aur decision aap le sakti ho ya parents se puchna padega?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: ₹3,499 monthly? That's still a lot... mummy-papa se baat karni padegi.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Theek hai, main suggest karun? JEE Arjuna 2027 batch bhi hai - ₹19,999 complete course, EMI sirf ₹1,999 monthly. Same quality teaching by Alakh Sir's team. Aur parents ko confidence dene ke liye, humara success rate dekh sakte hain - lakhs of students crack JEE through PW.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hmm... ₹1,999 better lagta hai but still expensive hai. Let me think about it.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Pallavi, main ek baat kahun? Jo log class 10 se start karte hain, unka success rate 80% higher hota hai. Aur delay karne se competition badhta jaata hai. Today decide karo toh main special discount bhi arrange kar sakti hun. Shall I book your Arjuna batch right now?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Nahi yaar... too expensive lagta hai abhi. Ghar pe discuss karna padega. Can I call back later?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Sure Pallavi! But seats limited hain is batch mein. Main aapko evening tak hold kar deti hun. Aur koi doubt ho toh call karna - this is the best time to start your JEE journey. All the best!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Okay... thanks. I'll think and let you know.
